title: Replace logo with corrected spelling: Umheed → Ummeed

requirements.text: Generate a new version of the uploaded logo image (sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png) where the text 'Ek Nayi Umheed' at the bottom of the circular logo is corrected to read 'Ek Nayi Ummeed', keeping all other visual elements (brain illustration, hands, circular border, 'Sisodiya Child Learning Centre' text) identical.

quotes: inside the logo the spelling of umheed is to be removed and in place of that I need ummeed

acceptanceCriteria: The logo image displays 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' (double-m) at the bottom of the circular badge
The text 'Umheed' no longer appears anywhere in the logo
All other logo elements (brain, hands, border, top text) remain visually unchanged
The corrected logo is used everywhere it appears in the app: HeroSection, Navigation, Footer, LogoDownloadButton, and SCLCLogo component

constraints: Only the spelling inside the logo image must change — no other design or layout modifications
Do not alter any other text or visual elements in the logo
nonGoals: Changing the tagline text rendered via the SCLCLogo React component overlay
Redesigning or restyling any page sections

edits: Change the bottom text inside the circular logo from 'Ek Nayi Umheed' to 'Ek Nayi Ummeed', keeping all other visual elements unchanged (sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png > sclc-logo-v2.dim_400x400.png)
